positive: Minimalist silhouette of a majestic cosmic fox, striding through a galaxy of glowing bioluminescent flora. The fox's fur is rendered with geometric, crystalline patterns in deep indigo and electric cyan. The background is an ethereal blend of nebula dust, warm violet, and starlight. Style: clean vector illustration meets ethereal fine art, high contrast, deep saturation. Composition: Central, balanced, suitable for screen printing. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, emphasizing the fox's outline. Print-friendly details: Solid background areas for easy apparel application, scalable, perfect linework.
negative: low quality, amateur, noisy, blurry, dirty, artifact, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor details, cartoon, sketch, photorealistic, oil painting
